title: phegopteris ferox
intro: Phegopteris ferox, also known as the sword fern or Japanese shield fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Dryopteridaceae. Traditionally, it has been used in Eastern medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Phegopteris ferox include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and support respiratory health. It can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and is often consumed in traditional Chinese medicine to promote overall well-being.
